query: SELECT id, slug, name FROM subjects ORDER BY id; SELECT DISTINCT subject FROM curriculumTopics ORDER BY subject; SELECT id, subject, code, title, status, last_covered_source, last_covered_at FROM curriculumTopics WHERE subject IN ('math','science','reading','language_arts','poetry','sel') OR title LIKE '%fraction%' OR title LIKE '%simile%' OR title LIKE '%haiku%' ORDER BY subject, ord LIMIT 30;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ZHgHA7566FjgCYD.51c539e8d5ba --database mm3swGictQLHDWKPJCGiHp --execute SELECT id, slug, name FROM subjects ORDER BY id; SELECT DISTINCT subject FROM curriculumTopics ORDER BY subject; SELECT id, subject, code, title, status, last_covered_source, last_covered_at FROM curriculumTopics WHERE subject IN ('math','science','reading','language_arts','poetry','sel') OR title LIKE '%fraction%' OR title LIKE '%simile%' OR title LIKE '%haiku%' ORDER BY subject, ord LIMIT 30;
